ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "new_user" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is new (1) or returning (0) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location information (city, state) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* User interests or preferences */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date and time the user was active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "total_pages_visited" INTEGER /* Total number of pages visited during the session */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "referral_url" TEXT /* URL from which the user arrived at the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic source (e.g., SEO, Ads, Direct) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic source (e.g., organic, paid, referral) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the traffic source */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the traffic source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-session association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with the user */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic source for the session */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the session */,
  "conversion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session resulted in a conversion (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES traffic_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users on the platform */,
  "new_users" INTEGER /* Total number of new users on the platform */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions recorded */,
  "total_pageviews" INTEGER /* Total number of page views */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of sessions */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of single-page sessions */,
  "top_pages" TEXT /* Most visited pages */,
  "top_sources" TEXT /* Most effective traffic sources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_total_users FOREIGN KEY ("total_users") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page visit */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the page was visited */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page visited */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the page was visited */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page visited */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., product, blog, category) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating user engagement on the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, marketer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "system_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submitted_on" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating (e.g., 1 to 5) for the feedback */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., technical, user experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_metrics" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion metric entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic source associated with the conversions */,
  "total_conversions" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions tracked */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate calculated from total users */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated from conversions */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost associated with each conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES traffic_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign metric entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign related to the metrics */,
  "sessions" INTEGER /* Total sessions generated from the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Total clicks received from the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Total conversions achieved from the campaign */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the campaign */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) of the campaign */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who encountered the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., client-side, server-side) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Specific error code */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission assigned to the role */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
